extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: for criminal proceedings, all Against rows are Nil, while the Promoters’ By row has one matter and is excluded; for statutory/regulatory proceedings, all Against rows are Nil, and tax is kept separate, with 3 Against our Company tax proceedings and Nil against subsidiaries, while the Promoters’ 2 tax proceedings are personal matters and excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is the Company Against amount of ₹7.71 million; subsidiary Against amounts are Nil, and all By rows and promoter amounts are excluded, giving ₹7.71 million = ₹0.771 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated March 31, 2025 and provides component amounts but no stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted. Company-wide customer concentration for full Fiscal 2025 is based on revenue from operations: top 5 customers were 97.96% and top 10 customers were 99.97%; source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
